title: erythrina subumbrans
intro: Erythrina subumbrans, also known as the coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Australia and is known for its vibrant red flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Erythrina subumbrans can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
